_comment: This file documents the config structure. Set SENDERS and CURRENCY_ACCOUNTS as env vars using the formats shown below.
_notes: notificationLabel is optional — if set, it appears in error notification subjects e.g. 'YNAB automation: failed to parse order email (Alice)'
CURRENCY_ACCOUNTS is optional — omit if all your transactions are in one currency
When setting env vars, use the value of SENDERS_example as the SENDERS value (a raw JSON array string)
Remove the _comment, _notes, and _example suffixes — those are documentation only
